periods_month_range.name: periods_month_range
periods_month_range.value: ("periods"."start_month" IS NULL OR ("periods"."start_month" >= 1 AND "periods"."start_month" <= 12)) AND ("periods"."end_month" IS NULL OR ("periods"."end_month" >= 1 AND "periods"."end_month" <= 12))

periods_day_range.name: periods_day_range
periods_day_range.value: ("periods"."start_day" IS NULL OR ("periods"."start_day" >= 1 AND "periods"."start_day" <= 31)) AND ("periods"."end_day" IS NULL OR ("periods"."end_day" >= 1 AND "periods"."end_day" <= 31))

periods_valid_range.name: periods_valid_range
periods_valid_range.value: "periods"."start_year" IS NULL OR "periods"."end_year" IS NULL OR "periods"."start_year" <= "periods"."end_year"
